_comment: Simplified-Chinese strings (machine draft from Phase 1b; native-reviewed and published in Phase 1d). Mirrors every key in en.json; resolved per page via the eleventyComputed `t` lookup (lang: zh), with English fallback for any missing key. Proper nouns / org & person names / the brand 'EBiM Benchmark' / product names (Mobile FR3 Duo) are kept as-is; prose, UI labels, headings and meta are translated. HTML entities (&/ /©/—) are kept literal and emitted with the `safe` filter, exactly as in en.json.

competition.title: EBiM 竞赛 · 跨大洲机器人基准
competition.description: 每项任务最高可赢取 $5,250（现金 + 购买代金券）：在 Mobile FR3 Duo 上完成线缆布线、可变形物体操作与辅助生活，覆盖四个测试平台。
competition.ogTitle: EBiM 竞赛 · 跨大洲机器人基准
competition.ogDescription: 开放仿真基准，并在汉堡、慕尼黑、匹兹堡和上海的 Mobile FR3 Duo 平台上进行真实机器人验证。涵盖线缆、可变形物体与辅助生活。
